en-US 60 Linkage Web Development: [Active Pooling] Lead Generation Specialist - Virtual Assistant Pampanga Paid Social Media Advertising, Social Media Marketing, Tracking and Attribution, Bug Tracking, Social Media Management, Social Media Ads, KPI Tracking, Social Media Content, and Inventory Tracking Back-End Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> [REMOTE] <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://linkage.ph">http://linkage.ph</a> </p> <div class="single-job-form"> <p>At <strong>Linkage Web Solutions</strong>, we’re growing our network of high-performing Virtual Assistants—and right now, we’re building a <strong>priority pool of Lead Generation Specialists</strong> for upcoming client opportunities.</p> <p>If you’re skilled at finding, qualifying, and reaching out to leads—this is your chance to get matched with international clients.</p> <p><strong>Why Join Our Talent Pool?</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Priority access</strong> to client openings</li> <li><strong>Fast-tracked hiring</strong> once matched</li> <li>Optional <strong>Free GoHighLevel (GHL) Training</strong> to upgrade your skills</li> <li><strong>$4–$5/hour</strong> competitive rate</li> </ul> <p><strong>What You’ll Do (Depending on Client Needs)</strong></p> <ul> <li>Research and identify potential leads (B2B or B2C)</li> <li>Build and manage lead lists using tools or CRMs</li> <li>Conduct outreach via email, LinkedIn, or other platforms</li> <li>Qualify leads based on client criteria</li> <li>Maintain accurate records and pipeline tracking</li> </ul> <p><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in <strong>lead generation, prospecting, or outreach</strong></li> <li>Familiarity with tools like LinkedIn, Apollo, CRM systems, or similar</li> <li>Strong written English (especially for outreach messages)</li> <li>Detail-oriented and results-driven</li> <li>Able to work independently in a remote setup</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to Have</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in cold email or LinkedIn outreach campaigns</li> <li>Knowledge of GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar platforms</li> <li>Basic understanding of sales funnels or appointment setting</li> </ul> <p><strong>Important Note</strong></p> <p>This is part of our <strong>active candidate pooling</strong>. There is no fixed start date, but <strong>qualified candidates are prioritized and contacted first</strong> once a matching opportunity becomes available.</p> <p>Send your resume to <strong><a class="__cf_email__" href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection">[email&nbsp;protected]</a></strong><br> <strong>Subject:</strong> <em>Lead Generation Specialist – Active Pooling</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>-</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><em><strong>Data Privacy Notice:</strong></em></p> <p><em>By submitting your application, you consent to the collection, processing, and storage of your personal information for recruitment purposes. Applicant information may be retained in our recruitment database for consideration in current and future opportunities for up to 6&nbsp;months, unless deletion is requested.</em></p> <p><em>Your information will only be accessed by authorized recruitment personnel and may be shared with clients for endorsement purposes related to job applications.</em></p> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/linkage-web-development-active-pooling-lead-generation-specialist-virtual-assistant">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/linkage-web-development-active-pooling-lead-generation-specialist-virtual-assistant</a></p> Thu, 28 May 2026 21:38:25 +0000 Sat, 27 Jun 2026 21:38:25 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/linkage-web-development-active-pooling-lead-generation-specialist-virtual-assistant https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/linkage-web-development-active-pooling-lead-generation-specialist-virtual-assistant Community Sports Partners: Web Developer Buenos Aires Adobe Creative Suite, Adobe Photoshop, Community Growth, Architect, Architecture, Blog Writing, Email Campaigns, Editing, Audio Editing, and Brand Identity Design Back-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5359/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Buenos Aires, Argentina <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://communitysportspartners.ca">http://communitysportspartners.ca</a> </p> <strong>Description</strong><br><p>Community Sports Partners is one of the largest and fastest-growing private youth sports operators in the GTA. We are dedicated to providing fun, engaging experiences that create lasting memories for the youth and families in our communities!</p><p>We are seeking a talented <strong>Web Developer</strong> with strong front-end and back-end development skills. The ideal candidate will be proficient in <strong>PHP, SQL, AJAX, HTML, and CSS</strong>, and have hands-on experience with UI/UX design, including A/B testing. Additionally, you should have experience integrating and working with APIs such as Stripe, Square POS, Twilio, and Brevo. You will play a crucial role in enhancing our digital platforms, ensuring a seamless user experience, and implementing effective web solutions.</p><br><br><strong>Requirements</strong><br><p>- Develop, maintain, and enhance web applications using PHP (Laravel), SQL, AJAX, HTML, JavaScript and CSS.</p><p>- Collaborate with the design team to create and implement UI/UX improvements.</p><p>- Conduct A/B testing to optimize user interfaces and improve user experience.</p><p>- Integrate and maintain third-party APIs, including Stripe, Square POS, Twilio, and Brevo.</p><p>- Debug and troubleshoot issues to ensure the stability and performance of web applications.</p><p>- Stay up-to-date with emerging trends and technologies in web development and UI/UX design.</p><p> </p><p><strong>Qualifications:</strong></p><p><strong>Required:</strong></p><p>- Experience and fluidity learning and working on legacy systems.</p><p>- Good level of spoken and written English.</p><p>- Proven experience as a full-stack PHP Web Developer.</p><p>- Strong, up-to-date knowledge of front-end technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, AJAX.</p><p>- Proficient in back-end development using PHP and SQL.</p><p>- Experience with UI/UX design and A/B testing.</p><p>- Experience implementing and interacting with the Twilio, SendGrid, RingCentral and Stripe APIs.</p><p>- Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a remote environment.</p><p>- Strong problem-solving skills and atte
